name: Harbourplace West
description:
A thick population of tourists slows your progress.  One of the tourist
families stops you and asks you to take their pictures.  The man hands you his
camera, but you look at it in confusion when you realize it is more complex
than a global optimizer.  You hand the camera back and the man yells expletives
back at you in a strange tongue.  To the harbour continues to the south and
east.
